supabase_tables.note: Live data already persists in Supabase. Hermes can read from these tables.

supabase_user_preferences.note: No user_preferences table exists. Would need migration.

supabase_chat_history.note: No chat_history table exists. Would need migration. Privacy concerns.

file_backed_memory.note: JSON files can store durable memory. Already used for second-brain index.

recommendation.short_term: Keep localStorage for conversation history and usage ledger. It is simple, private, and sufficient.
recommendation.medium_term: If cross-device sync is needed, create a supabase table for chat_history with RLS.
recommendation.long_term: Consider a dedicated memory service for large-scale durable memory.
recommendation.critical: Do not store sensitive data in localStorage. Do not sync PII without encryption.

implementation.second_brain_index: JSON files (current) — sufficient for research memory

export_plan.note: No export mechanism exists. Could add JSON export button for usage ledger and chat history.
export_plan.recommendation: Add export button for usage ledger to CSV/JSON for cost reporting.
